name: lsp-mcp
description: Meta-LSP MCP server: a thin router that fans requests across user-configured LSP servers

scripts.build: tsc && shx rm -rf plugins/lsp-mcp/dist && shx cp -r dist plugins/lsp-mcp/dist
scripts.prepare-plugin-dist: shx rm -rf plugins/lsp-mcp/dist && shx cp -r dist plugins/lsp-mcp/dist
